ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Zootian Expanse Innkeeper is the locality-facing innkeeper interface in Zootian Expanse, useful for provides lodging, local gossip, traveler warnings, and emergency favors.
Zootian Expanse Clerk is the locality-facing clerk interface in Zootian Expanse, useful for generic locality-facing interface retained from baseline canonical content.
Zootian Expanse Shrine Attendant is the locality-facing shrine attendant interface in Zootian Expanse, useful for maintains offerings, notices breaches, and guides minor local rites.
Zootian Expanse Caravan Hand is the locality-facing caravan hand interface in Zootian Expanse, useful for generic locality-facing interface retained from baseline canonical content.

street_level_faction_presence.what_they_look_like_in_practice: Storehouse seals, herd marks, wagon tallies, and field authority matter more than ornament.
street_level_faction_presence.who_benefits: Reliable producers and those who protect supply lines.
street_level_faction_presence.who_fears_them: Skimmers, negligent handlers, and outsiders who disrupt seasonal work.

greetings: Work and weather are normal first topics.
hospitality_rules: Food, water, and animal space are offered according to season and actual capacity.
taboo_topics: treating supply work as lesser than urban display
faith_etiquette: Practical gratitude and renewal customs matter at household and roadside shrines.
suspicious_behavior: tampering with stores or herd movement
outsider_mistakes: assuming the supply base is politically simple

ordinary_life_surface.what_people_do_all_day: People farm, herd, shear, store, mend, tally, and move raw goods in season-bound cycles.
ordinary_life_surface.what_places_feel_like: Lanolin, grain dust, leather, stable heat, damp earth, and wagon grease define ordinary life.
ordinary_life_surface.home_and_guest_norms: Homes fold storage, work, and family labor into the same daily pattern.

public_rumors: A shipment was short before it ever reached town.
half_true_rumors: Someone in authority is protecting a favored supplier.
faction_planted_rumors: Harder oversight is the only way to keep the stores sound.
religious_warnings: Poor yields and poor conduct are being linked in local talk.
trade_concerns: Road wear and theft risk are rising.
criminal_whispers: People know where skimmed stock goes if they ask the wrong person.
historical_misconceptions: Older families retell production history in ways that flatter their own endurance.

contradiction_aware_myth_versions.claim: Some lineages claim they carried the entire burden alone.

travel_and_transition_texture.feel: Roads are practical, heavily used, and visibly shaped by freight and animal movement.
travel_and_transition_texture.checkpoint_behavior: Storehouse and herd checks matter more than ceremony.
travel_and_transition_texture.caravan_or_route_custom: Animal welfare and timing affect who moves first.
travel_and_transition_texture.regional_handoff_custom: Responsibility shifts with wagons, stores, and witness marks.

text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.where_strangers_gather: At the inn bench, wagon yard, or storehouse queue.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.public_notice_drawing_attention: A tally notice has changed what leaves next.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.visible_tension: People are watching whether local need or scheduled export wins.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.private_trouble: A respected family may be hiding a shortfall.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.one_hour_entanglement: A newcomer could be pulled into a freight dispute or missing stock accusation quickly.

relationship_and_reputation_consequences.trust: People are remembered for keeping animals, stores, and deliveries sound.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_good_memory: Showing up on time, sharing work honestly, and protecting yield.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_bad_memory: Waste, theft, and public contempt for producers.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_favors_matter: Feed, storage, wagon repair, herd help, and an introduction to someone who can move goods.
